text: Starting something new takes real courage, and the fact that you're doing this despite the fear shows what you're made of. Scary ventures are scary precisely because they matter to you, and that passion is going to carry you through the tough moments. You don't need to have it all figured out right now—nobody does at the beginning. What you need is the willingness to learn, adapt, and keep moving forward, and you clearly have that. Trust yourself. The people who care about you believe in you, and you should too. You've got this.
